comment: Trust anchor for install_node_prebuilt.py. sha256 values are copied from the official https://nodejs.org/dist/v<version>/SHASUMS256.txt and frozen here, in-tree and code-reviewed, so a compromised nodejs.org/CDN response or a defeated TLS path cannot swap in a malicious archive together with a matching checksum. To move Node: fetch the new SHASUMS256.txt, update default_version and the per-asset digests below for every supported os/arch, and review the diff.
